title: Google Is Rebranding the Fitbit App to ‘Google Health’
summary: Google is sunsetting Google Fit by year’s end. While Fitbit remains very much alive, the rebranded Google Health app is your one-stop shop for all things health and fitness.

title: Google Ditches the Screen With the New Fitbit Air (2026)
summary: Powered by Gemini and designed around simplicity, the new Fitbit Air could finally give the screenless fitness tracker market a compelling alternative to Whoop.

title: Arm has a ton of chip demand. There’s just one problem.
summary: Arm’s stock was falling, with analysts noting the company hasn’t yet secured manufacturing capacity for all its fresh CPU demand.

title: Peloton stock rises as higher subscription prices help company drive a profitable quarter
summary: Peloton CEO Peter Stern told CNBC that the company believes raising prices on its subscriptions was a value-driven move.

title: Orphaned baby hippo to be hand-reared by keepers at Kenya sanctuary
summary: The baby hippo, which has been named Bumpy, was found clinging to its lifeless mother at a lake.

title: RIP social media. What comes next is messy.
summary: As social media splinters, how can we keep the new online spaces from devolving into toxic pits of despair?

title: Starbucks baristas on the new $1,200 bonus: ‘It’s almost impossible to meet every goal they want’
summary: Baristas tell MarketWatch that the company’s new goals are unrealistic, especially while stores face staffing problems.

title: China’s Moonshot AI raises $2B at $20B valuation as demand for open-source AI skyrockets
summary: Moonshot's annualized recurring revenue topped $200 million in April, driven by rapid growth in paid subscriptions and API usage.

title: PSG’s Champions League win marred by night of violence and riots in Paris
summary: Paris Saint-Germain claimed a 6-5 Champions League semifinal win over Bayern Munich, but it erupted in domestic trouble.

title: Bitcoin’s unusual technical action points to a crypto bull market, says Fundstrat’s Tom Lee
summary: Lee says activity in recent months point to a bullish phase for cryptocurrencies.

title: Humanoid robot becomes Buddhist monk in South Korea
summary: A Buddhist temple in Seoul introduced South Korea’s first humanoid robot monk.

title: South Africa condemns 'fake videos' of alleged xenophobic attacks
summary: As claims of xenophobia in South Africa mount, Ghana calls on the African Union to send a fact-finding mission.

title: Chad declares national mourning after deadly Boko Haram ambush
summary: The killing of two generals near Lake Chad follows a recent Boko Haram attack in the same region that left dozens dead.
